notes: Use this manifest to track intentional template changes.
Bump templateVersion when the template's required files, workflows, or operational behavior change.
Bump schemaVersion only when the manifest structure itself changes incompatibly.
Template version 1.1.0 adds ggshield through the pre-commit framework and requires GITGUARDIAN_API_KEY or ggshield auth for secret scanning.
Template version 1.2.0 adds CI-side ggshield JSON report generation and uploads the result as a workflow artifact.
Template version 1.3.0 adds a standard adoption metadata file, a comparison helper script, and explicit update workflow documentation for existing repos.
Template version 1.4.0 adds a template constitution, sync script, index-server bootstrap guidance, optional spec scaffolding, and stronger Copilot instruction defaults.

Template version 1.5.0 clarifies .instructions as the default local guidance layer, preserves existing instructions/ product surfaces during adoption, and adds a dedicated ggshield PR and audit workflow template.
Template version 1.5.1 fixes hook self-match false positives in PII and env-leak scanning, adds line-level env-leak allowlists for documented public metadata, and improves env-leak diagnostics.
Template version 1.5.2 stops treating non-secret GitHub Actions metadata variables as sensitive by prefix while retaining explicit secret-name coverage such as GITHUB_TOKEN.
Template version 1.5.3 adds focused metadata-alignment and hook-regression scripts, wires them into CI, and documents the narrow validation path for template-managed changes.

Template version 1.6.0 upgrades the constitution to a structured, guardrail-oriented schema covering agent scope, design simplicity, testing strategy, documentation consistency, and governance policy.
Template version 1.7.0 adds observability guardrails that standardize structured logging, function tracing, and stack-bearing error diagnostics as global template expectations.
Template version 1.8.0 adds constitutional rules for branch usage, ancestry-preserving merges, branch cleanup, pull-request CI gates, and clean-tree release or deployment discipline.
Template version 1.9.0 adds dedicated gitleaks secret-scanning workflows for PR, manual, and scheduled repo or history scans, plus a Semgrep workflow for supplemental workflow and CI/config analysis.
Template version 1.10.0 makes gitleaks and Semgrep mandatory local pre-push hooks managed by pre-commit, adds a repo-owned .gitleaks.toml baseline, and updates CI to replay the same pre-push policy.

Template version 1.11.0 adds an explicit MIT LICENSE for template-repo, documents that adopting repos must choose their own license posture, and adds a constitutional rule requiring explicit license or proprietary-status declaration before public distribution.

Template version 1.12.0 expands the constitution's security article with generic application-security rules for path containment, loopback-by-default admin binding, TLS verification, header-based credential transport, CSP hygiene, and configuration-gated diagnostics.
Template version 1.13.0 promotes gitleaks to mandatory pre-commit hook, promotes ggshield to mandatory pre-push hook with .ggshield.yml exclusions, and updates the layered hook model numbering.

Template version 1.14.0 enriches PII hook with Azure/IT-focused false-positive reduction (version-string IPv4, Git SHA thumbprint, GUID credit card, bot emails, vendor/minified skip), adds well-known DNS IPs to .pii-allowlist, aligns .gitleaks.toml path exclusions with .ggshield.yml, and adds centralized scanner exclusion guidance.

Template version 1.15.0 adds a generalized clean-room publish script (Publish-ToPublicRepo.ps1) for dev-to-public mirror workflows with .publish-exclude stripping, forbidden-artifact verification, PII scanning, and local/review/direct-push delivery modes.

Template version 1.16.0 adds git workflow spec (.instructions/shared/git-workflow.md) with branch naming, PR flow, merge strategy, release process, rollback patterns, and adopter guidance. Adds PR template, issue templates (bug, feature, template-change), SECURITY.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md, CHANGELOG.md, CODEOWNERS, dependabot.yml, auto-tag workflow, promotion-freshness workflow, Semgrep p/security-audit + .semgrep.yml custom rules, Pester test suite, and lockfile exclusion for env-leak scanning.
